_meta.prompt: Analyze customer-portal-frontend repository for codebase complexity, dependency risks, and migration readiness.

circularDependencies.detail: 4 cycles detected, 1 high-severity in auth-core ↔ user-profile. This is the single biggest migration risk.

legacyModuleDebt.detail: 22 of 40 total modules still use legacy NgModule pattern. Standalone conversion required for Angular 17+ best practices.

testCoverage.detail: 62.4% statement coverage, 48.1% branch coverage. Migration changes in untested paths will carry regression risk.

dependencyHealth.detail: Core framework 3 majors behind. 2 high-severity npm vulnerabilities. ngx-datatable maintenance status uncertain.

codeChurn.detail: Auth and payments modules show highest churn (890+ deletions in recent consolidation). Stabilisation needed before migration.

bundleComplexity.detail: 486 TS files across 24 modules. Route-level code splitting recently implemented (PORTAL-1054) but not yet covering all lazy routes.

dependencyRiskAssessment.reason: 3 major versions behind, LTS expired. Every sprint of delay increases migration difficulty as the ecosystem moves further ahead.
Low maintenance activity, Signals conflicts observed. May need replacement during or after migration.
Angular 19 supports zoneless. Removing it is optional but yields significant performance gains for the real-time dashboard widgets.
DragDrop API changes between v16 and v19. Allocation board depends on this heavily.
Transitive vulnerability via @angular/cli. Will be resolved automatically by the Angular upgrade.

strengths: RxJS already upgraded to v7 (eliminates one major migration blocker)
Team has recent hands-on signals experience (PORTAL-1003, PORTAL-1011)
blockers: Auth-core circular dependency must be resolved before standalone conversion
22 NgModules need standalone conversion (Angular 17+ recommended path)
Test coverage gaps in payments and forms modules — highest migration-risk areas

gitInferredSkills.evidence: 892 commits, primary contributor to auth/, payments/, shared/ui-kit/
534 commits, primary contributor to kyc/, transactions/, feature-flags/
1041 commits, highest contributor, owns core/ and shared/, led signals POC and rxjs codemod
245 commits, 30% SCSS contribution, owns i18n/ and marketing/
468 commits, owns build-scripts/ and angular.json, led ngx-charts replacement and lifecycle hooks migration
128 commits, junior contributor in notifications/ and shared/components/
